calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-02-2008 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-05-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-05-2008 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jul-15-08 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Settlement Conference. Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Jonathan M. Rutledge, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Yelena Tomashpolskaya.
Michael R. Chambers, Esq. appeared for defendant and cross-complainant Anthony Manning, who was not present at today's hearing.
Deanne J. Broglio, Esq. appeared for defendant and cross-complainant Eugene C. Plozay, who was not present at today's hearing.
Jodie Steinberg, Esq. appeared for defendant Ellen Fuerst, who was not present at today's hearing.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on September 28, 2007.

Settlement Agreement reached by the parties was placed on the record by Mr. Rutledge.

Pursuant to the terms of the agreement, defendant ANTHONY MANNING shall pay plaintiff Yelena Tomashpolskaya the sum of $7,000.00. defendant ELLEN FUERST shall pay plaintiff Yelena Tomashpolskaya the sum of $1,000.00. defendant EUGENE C. PLOZAY shall pay nothing ($0.00) to plaintiff Yelena Tomashpolskaya. Each party shall bear their own fees & costs. Additionally, all cross-complaints shall be dismissed by each of the cross-complainants.

Matter is continued to July 15, 2008 @ 10:00 a.m. in Department 212 on the Dismissal Calendar.

The Court approves the settlement agreement reached by the parties.
